summary: Add semantic critic and follow-up task generation
description: Add built-in critic checks and blocked follow-up task generation from critic findings so major findings become executable .go work instead of prose.
acceptance: Built-in critic blocks missing acceptance/verification and out-of-scope dirty changes.
Blocked critic findings can create a scoped follow-up task.

evidence.summary: Added built-in semantic critic flag and critic follow-up generation. --semantic-critic blocks generic/default acceptance or missing verification; --followup-on-block creates scoped .go follow-up tasks from critic findings. Verification: pytest -q 14 passed; make check passed.
